_readme: Phase 1d performance baseline — captured after Phase 1a audit logging is deployed.
Fill the zero values below by running the KQL queries in docs/baseline/kql-queries.md
against the App Insights instance after >= 20 agent turns.
Regression rule (Phase 2+): if p95AgentTurnMs increases > 20% or avgPromptTokens
increases > 200 tokens vs this baseline, a mitigation plan is required before merge.

perToolLatencyMs._note: Populated after first eval run — one entry per MCP tool name.
